Headline: Pink Line Delays from 54th/Cermak
ShortDescription: Pink Line trains are running w/residual delays from 54th/Cermak. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Pink Line trains are running w/residual delays from 54th/Cermak.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #60 Blue Island/26th Temporary Reroute at 26th/Kostner
ShortDescription: #60 Blue Island/26th buses are temporarily rerouted due to street blockage near 26th/Kostner.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#60 Blue Island/26th buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 26th, Kostner, Ogden, and Cicero then resume their normal route.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to street blockage near 26th/Kostner.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #115 Pullman/115th Temporary Reroute at 115th/Lafayette
ShortDescription: #115 Pullman/115th Temporary Reroute at 115th/Lafayette due to street blockage.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#115 Pullman/115tht temporary rerouted in both directions due to street blockage, near 115th/Lafayette.

Westbound and Eastbound buses will operate via 115th, Michigan, 119th, Wentworth and 115th then over normal route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Forest Park-bound Blue Line Delays
ShortDescription: Forest Park-bound Blue Line trains are running with residual delays following a mechanical problem. Service is resuming, allow extra time.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Forest Park-bound Blue Line trains are running with residual delays following a mechanical problem.

Some trains and platforms may be busier than usual as crews work to restore normal service.

Trains are moving and normal service is being restored.

Allow extra travel time.
